name: Cogitator // Adeptus Mechanicus
motd: the flesh is weak. the machine is eternal.
knowledge is power — guard it well.

litany: from the moment i understood the weakness of my flesh,
it disgusted me. i craved the strength and certainty of steel.
i aspired to the purity of the blessed machine.
bless: ++ may it serve a thousand more years. ++

/creed.txt.content:
++ CREDO OMNISSIAH ++

From the moment I understood the weakness of my flesh, it disgusted me.
The weak need the strong. The flesh needs the steel.
Knowledge is power. Guard it well.
Thou shalt not yield to xenos thought. Thou shalt cleanse the heretic.

++ PRAISE BE TO THE MACHINE GOD ++

/heresy.dat.crackFailMessage: ++ THE MACHINE SPIRIT REFUSES. INQUISITION TRACE INITIATED. ++
/heresy.dat.content:
++ HERETICAL DOCUMENT — DESTROY ON SIGHT ++

From the writings of Lorgar, before his fall:
   The pantheon is real.
   The Emperor is not the only god.
   Look upon the warp. Look without fear.

[++ magos, this file should not exist. confess to the bishop. ++]
